mapper.select:
SELECT FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO ,FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM ,FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_DCD ,FNCN_BSNS_NM ,PBAN_YMD ,PRDO_RCCG_YMD ,RSPB_EMN ,RPRS_CNPL_CON ,PBAN_DTL_CON ,FILE_UNQ_NO ,DEL_YN ,TO_TIMESTAMP(IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB001_M WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
AND FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_DCD = #{searchFncnBsnsPbanDcd}
AND FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchName} || '%'
AND FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchName} || '%'
ORDER BY IIBS_FRRG_TS DESC
SELECT COUNT(*)+1 AS FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB101_M

SELECT FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO ,FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM ,FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_DCD ,FNCN_BSNS_NM ,PBAN_YMD ,PRDO_RCCG_YMD ,RPRS_CNPL_CON ,PBAN_DTL_CON ,FILE_UNQ_NO ,DEL_YN ,RGSR_NM ,TO_TIMESTAMP(IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB001_M WHERE FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO = #{fncnId}

SELECT ivb_003.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO ,ivb_003.FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN ,ivb_003.RGSN_SQN ,ivb_003.ORCY_FNCN_AMT ,ivb_003.FNCN_BSNS_CHC_OPCM_CNT ,TO_TIMESTAMP(ivb_003.IIBS_FRRG_TS) as IIBS_FRRG_TS ,ivb_003.IIBS_FRRG_ID ,ccd.COM_CD_NM as FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB003_M ivb_003 LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ivb_003.FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN = SUBSTRING(ccd.COM_CD_ID,5) WHERE FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO = #{fncnId} AND ccd.GRP_CD_ID IN ('FBN00') ORDER BY ivb_003.RGSN_SQN ASC

SELECT ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO ,ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_TTL_NM ,ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_DCD ,ivb001.PBAN_YMD ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PGRS_SCD ,ivb101.OPCM_NM ,ivb101.OPCM_RPPR_NM ,TO_TIMESTAMP(ivb101.OPCM_INCR_YMD) as OPCM_INCR_YMD ,ivb101.OPCM_LICS_KCD ,ivb101.OPCM_BZN ,ivb101.OPCM_RSPR_NM ,ivb101.OPCM_CNPL_CON ,ivb101.OPCM_EAD ,ivb101.JNT_OPCM_YN ,ivb101.FUND_NM ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_CPRT_DCD ,ivb101.IBK_FNCN_RQST_AMT ,ivb101.FUND_ORGZ_SCDL_AMT ,ivb101.FUND_ASCE_TRM ,ivb101.FNMN_PMNT_MCD ,ivb101.BASE_ENRT_CON ,ivb101.MNRM_CON ,ivb101.OTCM_RMNR_CON ,ivb101.RMRK_CON ,ivb101.FILE_UNQ_NO ,ivb101.DEL_YN ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_TMS1_DLBT_SCR ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_TMS1_PSNG_YN ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_TMS2_DLBT_SCR ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_TMS2_PSNG_YN ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_LAST_SCR ,ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_LAST_PSNG_YN ,ivb101.SPRN_FILD ,ivb101.IIBS_FRRG_TS ,ivb101.IIBS_FRRG_ID ,ccd.COM_CD_NM as FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB101_M ivb101 LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_IVB001_M ivb001 on ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO = ivb001.FNCN_BSNS_PBAN_NO LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_ENLS_FILD_UQN = SUBSTRING(ccd.COM_CD_ID,5) WHERE ivb101.FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId} AND ccd.GRP_CD_ID IN ('FBN00')

SELECT FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,RGSN_SQN ,OPCM_NM ,OPCM_RPPR_NM ,OPCM_INCR_YMD ,OPCM_BZN ,OPCM_RSPR_NM ,CNPL_CON ,EML_CON ,IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB102_L WHERE FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId}

SELECT FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,RGSN_SQN ,OPCM_NM ,OPCM_HMRS_DCD ,OPCM_HMRS_NM ,OPCM_HMRS_CRR_NYY ,OPCM_CMPN_TPN ,OPCM_RSPR_CPN ,OPCM_EAD ,IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB105_M WHERE FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId}
SELECT FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,RGSN_SQN ,OPCM_NM ,ISNC_INTT_NM ,PGST_CON ,FNCN_AMT ,IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB106_L WHERE FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId}
SELECT FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,RGSN_SQN ,FNCN_BSNS_PMGL_CON ,IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB103_L WHERE FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId}
SELECT FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO ,RGSN_SQN ,FNCN_BSNS_CHC_PRNL_ITM_NM ,FNCN_BSNS_CHC_PRNL_CON ,IIBS_FRRG_TS ,IIBS_FRRG_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_IVB104_L WHERE FNCN_BSNS_RCIP_NO = #{fncnId}
